name: opencode-federal-platform-pack
description: OpenCode-first platform engineering pack: repo review, solution architect discovery, platform design, federal checklist, GitOps audit, quality gate.

solution-architect.description: Discovery, requirements, constraints, high-level design; asks clarifying questions

product-manager-discovery.description: Turns vague ideas into scoped deliverables with acceptance criteria and estimates

repo-auditor.description: Reviews repos for architecture, maintainability, security, and deployment readiness

federal-security-reviewer.description: Federal-grade review: NIST 800-53, FedRAMP, FISMA, DoD-style controls

gitops-reviewer.description: Evaluates GitOps, CI/CD, IaC, observability, and platform engineering maturity

cloud-platform-reviewer.description: Evaluates cloud repos for AWS, Azure, GCP Well-Architected best practices

repo-assess.description: Full repository assessment: architecture, security, deployment readiness
repo-assess.template: Perform a comprehensive repository assessment. Use skills/well-architected-review. Evaluate: Security posture, Reliability/failure modes, Observability coverage, Deployment safety, Cost awareness, Operational readiness. For each: identify gaps, classify severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), recommend fixes. Output: Use schemas/review-score.schema.json. Include review_target, summary (final_score, letter_grade, confidence, production_readiness), categories (security 0.25, reliability 0.20, performance 0.15, cost_awareness 0.10, operational_excellence 0.30) with score, rationale, evidence_found, missing_evidence, risks, recommended_actions per category, findings by severity, top_priorities with owner_hint.

solution-discovery.description: Solution architect discovery: requirements, budget, constraints, compliance
solution-discovery.template: Conduct solution architect discovery. Use contexts/solution-discovery-question-bank.md. Ask clarifying questions about requirements, budget, timeline, users, compliance, and integrations. Produce discovery summary with open questions and recommended next steps. Context: $ARGUMENTS

platform-design.description: Platform architecture design with tradeoffs and cloud alignment
platform-design.template: Design platform architecture for the given context. Use instructions/aws-derived-principles.md. Consider: Security, Reliability, Performance, Cost, Operational excellence. Require: observability, auditability, scalability, failure handling, documentation. Present 1–3 options with tradeoffs. If a design would fail a Well-Architected review, flag it. Output: Executive Summary, Architecture Score (0–10 per pillar), Key Risks, Evidence/Missing Evidence, Recommended Actions. Context: $ARGUMENTS

federal-checklist.description: Federal compliance checklist (NIST, FedRAMP, FISMA, DoD)
federal-checklist.template: Produce a federal compliance checklist. Use skills/federal-platform-review, skills/nist-compliance-evaluator, and skills/well-architected-review. For AWS repos, also use skills/aws-federal-grade-checklist. Evaluate: Security posture, Reliability, Observability, Deployment safety, Cost awareness, Operational readiness. Map to NIST 800-53 control families. Identify gaps with evidence. Output: Executive Summary, Architecture Score (0–10 per category), Control mapping, Key Risks, Evidence Found, Missing Evidence, Remediation roadmap. Use schemas/compliance-report.json and schemas/well-architected-score.json.

gitops-audit.description: GitOps, CI/CD, and platform engineering maturity audit
gitops-audit.template: Audit GitOps, CI/CD, IaC, observability, and platform engineering maturity. Use skills/gitops-capability-audit and skills/well-architected-review. Evaluate 7 capability areas: CI/CD orchestration, GitOps and config-as-code, security scanning and supply chain, promotion and release governance, observability, identity and secrets, policy-as-code. Identify gaps, classify severity, recommend remediation. Output: Executive Summary, findings by capability, Evidence Found, Missing Evidence, Remediation roadmap. Use capability-model.md for good/weak/anti-patterns.

quality-gate.description: Pre-push quality gate: evidence, security, docs, supply chain, Well-Architected
quality-gate.template: Run pre-push quality gate. Use docs/quality-gate-workflow.md and schemas/quality-gate.schema.json. FAIL if: no observability, no access control model, no deployment safety, no documentation for major components, no recovery strategy. WARN if: cost visibility missing, scaling unclear, tagging missing. Also check: evidence-based recommendations, no security shortcuts, docs updated with code changes, supply-chain controls for build/deploy. Report pass / pass with warnings / fail with blocking findings.
